title: options-educator-trailer-v2-ltx
brief: Three cinematic LTX scenes for the options-educator-trailer-v2 hybrid video. Opening shot of the iconic Charging Bull bronze statue on Wall Street at dusk with blue-teal and amber city light reflections. Middle shot aerial orbit above the New York Stock Exchange building and lower Manhattan financial district at golden hour. Closing shot of a brilliant golden sunrise over a calm dark ocean horizon.
global_style: Cinematic 35mm anamorphic, golden-hour amber and deep navy palette, dramatic natural lighting, shallow depth of field

scenes.storyboard_prompt: The iconic Charging Bull bronze statue on Wall Street seen from a dramatic low angle at dusk, the polished bronze surface gleaming with warm amber and blue-teal city light reflections, lower Manhattan glass skyscrapers rising behind it in soft bokeh, deep navy sky above, wide cinematic shot, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.video_prompt: Camera slowly pushes in toward the bull from a low angle, the bronze surface catches and shifts warm amber and cool blue reflections as city lights glow, the glass towers behind slowly illuminate as dusk deepens to night
scenes.motion: slow camera push toward the bull, building lights coming on in background bokeh, ambient city glow intensifying, atmospheric haze
scenes.style: warm amber and blue-teal reflections on bronze, deep navy dusk sky, glowing city bokeh background, dramatic cinematic lighting
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark, blurry, ugly, deformed, daylight, bright sky

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Breathtaking aerial shot at golden hour looking down at the New York Stock Exchange building and lower Manhattan financial district, warm amber late afternoon light casting long diagonal shadows between glass towers, tiny figures on the streets below, the distinctive neoclassical NYSE building columns visible, wide 35mm anamorphic
scenes.video_prompt: Slow rotating aerial orbit around the NYSE building, long shadows sweeping as light shifts, glass towers reflecting orange-gold sunset light, birds flying below camera level, full financial district visible in the frame
scenes.camera: high aerial slow clockwise orbit, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: camera slowly orbiting, shadows shifting on buildings, glass facades reflecting gold sunset, birds passing below
scenes.style: warm golden-hour amber light, deep blue sky above, glass and steel towers glowing orange-gold, cinematic color grade
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark, blurry, ugly, deformed, night, rain

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Perfectly centered wide shot of a brilliant golden sunrise breaking over a dark calm ocean horizon, the sun disc touching the water line, warm amber and gold light spreading across a glassy dark ocean surface toward the camera in a wide reflection path, deep blue sky above fading to rich amber at the horizon, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.video_prompt: Sun slowly rises above the ocean horizon, the golden reflection path on the water widens toward camera, sky colors deepen from blue to amber as the sun clears the horizon, gentle swells catching and releasing golden light
scenes.camera: perfectly centered wide still shot, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: sun rising, golden reflection widening on water, subtle ocean swells rolling toward camera, sky warming from blue to amber
scenes.style: deep blue sky, rich amber-gold horizon, brilliant golden sun reflection on dark calm water, serene and triumphant
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark, blurry, ugly, deformed, clouds, overcast, people, boats
